column1: People have always told stories about those who lived long lives.
Research has shown that Methuselah really was as old as is claimed.
Medical care in the past helped people to live longer.
It's sometimes difficult to check a person's real age.
People who live in Ikaria and Okinawa do not get serious diseases.
Life expectancy is now high in all parts of the world.
Life expectancy will probably reach its highest possible level soon.
Finding pleasure in life increases life expectancy.
